news_items.headline: Nolan McLean gets through 'risky' second inning vs. Braves to give Mets crucial length
news_items.summary: Nolan McLean was very close to not getting out of the second inning of the Mets' 7-5 win over the Braves, but the young right-hander grinded through and provided four solid innings.

news_items.headline: Misiorowski Ks 15 in complete-game, 1-hit gem
news_items.summary: Jacob Misiorowski struck out a career-high 15 and pitched a complete-game one-hitter to lead the Brewers to a 6-0 win over the Phillies on Friday night.

news_items.headline: Astros' Alvarez hits grand slam, 2-run HR in 1st
news_items.summary: Yordan Alvarez hit a grand slam and two-run homer in the first inning for the Astros against the Royals on Friday night.

news_items.headline: Ohtani not in Dodgers' lineup Friday, but avoids I...
news_items.summary: Two-way star Shohei Ohtani was not in the Dodgers' lineup for their series opener against the White Sox on Friday, one day after he was removed from a game in Pittsburgh because of left knee inflammation.

news_items.headline: Boone says Yanks don't owe Chapman an apology
news_items.summary: One day after Boston's Aroldis Chapman repeated his belief that he's owed an apology from the Yankees for the way the team treated him at the end of the 2022 season, New York manager Aaron Boone said Friday that he doesn't see a need.

news_items.headline: Mets SS Lindor (calf) could return end of June
news_items.summary: Francisco Lindor has started playing simulated games, and Mets president of baseball operations David Stearns is hopeful the shortstop can return to the team by the end of June.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Flaherty leaves start early due to left le...
news_items.summary: Tigers pitcher Jack Flaherty pitched just three innings Friday night against the Guardians before leaving his start due to left leg discomfort.

news_items.headline: Braves pitcher Strider exits with arm soreness
news_items.summary: Braves pitcher Spencer Strider will undergo imaging after he left Friday night against the Mets in the fourth inning because of right shoulder and elbow soreness.

news_items.headline: Mariners' Arozarena exits with apparent leg injury...
news_items.summary: Seattle outfielder Randy Arozarena left the Mariners' game Friday night against the Nationals because of an apparent leg injury.

news_items.headline: Alcantara becomes 5th active Dominican-born pitcher to reach 1,000 K's
Mets ask Devin Williams for a four-out save and closer delivers against Braves
news_items.summary: The moment called for it and Mets manager Carlos Mendoza asked Devin Williams to get a four-out save against the powerful Braves, and the closer delivered.

news_items.headline: Mariners prove a little rain can’t hurt, win 10-2 over Nationals
news_items.summary: Bryce Miller goes eight strong, Dominic Canzone gets the hard parts of a cycle in big Mariners win

news_items.headline: Astros Score 9 in First, Hold On for 10-8 Victory Over Royals
news_items.summary: Only the Houston Astros this season could deliver angst and high drama after posting a whopping 9 runs in the first inning. What should’ve been a contest set on cruise control, quickly became a roller coaster affair, between dueling bullpens. Houston would hang on for a 10-8 win. Royals starter Luinder Avila […]

news_items.summary: The Mets defeated the Braves powered by a super day at the plate by Bo Bichette.

news_items.summary: Joe Ryan hung in there, and a bunch of homers helped save several blown leads.
